commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Antigravity compact icon lane resolution to prefer Gemini session and weekly quota-summary rows, uses provider-specific resolver style for merged icons, snaps rounded progress-bar edge fills, and adds focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main does not resolve Antigravity quota-summary rows as the compact Gemini session/weekly pair, and the merged-icon path passes the combined style instead of the provider style.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the prior blocker is addressed and the remaining action is ordinary maintainer and CI review.

target.title: Fix Antigravity Gemini icon lanes and exhausted bar fill
target.body: ## Summary The Antigravity icon now shows the two Gemini limits that matter for the compact view: - top lane: Gemini session - bottom lane: Gemini weekly This replaces the previous behavior where the compact icon could show weekly quota lanes from different Antigravity quota groups, such as Gemini weekly and Claude + GPT weekly. Fix Antigravity’s compact menu bar quota display and polish exhausted quota bars. ## Why Antigravity exposes separate quota rows for Gemini and Claude + GPT. In the compact menu bar icon, mixing quota groups makes the two-lane display harder to interpret: both lanes look related, but they may represent different model groups instead of the Gemini session/weekly pair. The progress bar fix addresses a related visual consistency issue. When a quota rounded to `0% left`, the label showed an exhausted state, but the bar could still render a thin green sliver from a fractional value. Snapping rounded edge cases makes the visual match the text. ## What Changed - Resolve Antigravity icon lanes from Gemini quota-summary rows: - top: Gemini session - bottom: Gemini weekly - Keep Gemini lane selection provider-specific instead of borrowing Claude + GPT rows. - Use Antigravity’s resolver even when the visible icon style is combined. - Snap progress bar fills at rounded 0%/100% edges. ## Testing - `swift test --filter 'CodexBarTests.StatusItemAnimationSignatureTests|CodexBarTests.CodexBarTests|CodexBarTests.MenuCardQuotaWarningMarkerTests'` - `make check` - `make test`
target.author: zihao-qi
